ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid or RFQ */,
  "bid_no" TEXT /* Bid number or request for quotation number */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the bid or RFQ */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the items being procured */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the items being procured */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department initiating the bid or RFQ */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address where the items are needed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the bid or RFQ */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the bid or RFQ */,
  "label_code" INTEGER /* Label code for the bid or RFQ */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the bid or RFQ */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bid or RFQ was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the bid or RFQ */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bid or RFQ was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bid or RFQ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address_line" TEXT /* Address line */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the address */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the item */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_items" (
  "bid_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid-item association */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid or RFQ */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item for the bid or RFQ */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item for the bid or RFQ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_items_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, department head, procurement officer) */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid or RFQ being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bid or RFQ */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid or RFQ */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_versions_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status event */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid or RFQ */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bid or RFQ (e.g., open, awarded, closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the status change */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_status_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "vendor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_vendor" (
  "bid_vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid-vendor association */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid or RFQ */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Price quoted by the vendor for the bid or RFQ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_vendor_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_vendor_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
